---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement (editing capability, generation support, UX)
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What are you trying to do that the editor doesn't support today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it relates to a future generation, note that
`docs/ADDING_A_GENERATION.md` describes how generations are added as data.

## Scope / generation

- **Affects which generation(s)?** <!-- Gen 1, Gen 2, future -->
- **Is this data-only (names/offsets/tables) or new behavior?**

## Alternatives considered

Anything you've already tried or other approaches.
